extra.reason: Characterization checks implemented and VERIFIED locally (QEMU TCG, no CI): both nix checks pass — characterization (FIFO batch / FD+RTR+EFF / bidirectional shared-bus / pool-exhaustion+recovery) and characterization_sort (-s ascending + negative control). byte-level frame_compare.py replaces substring grep. Unblocks Phase 1 (84a.1).

Phase 1 Router core landed (35f671e, pushed). Router/Peer/PeerRegistry introduced; CAN<->single-peer data path routed through Router::route(frame,originId); m_peerThread spine removed. Behavior-preserving: all five nix VM checks pass locally under TCG (characterization + characterization_sort byte-identical, tcp, sctp, udp). Native build clean (-Werror) + UDP loopback smoke test passed. Per-peer seq_no/Decoder relocation deferred to Phase 2.

Phase 2 UDP multi-peer hub implemented and verified: single UDPThread multiplexes N peers over one socket (per-peer egress buffer/seq_no/flush timerfd, IP+port source demux, origin-exclusion fan-out incl peer<->peer reflection). 84a.2.1 resolved via per-peer timerfd in select(). --peer/--peers-file CLI; single-peer byte-identical. All acceptance behaviors pass: native 4-proc loopback hub + nix VM checks multipeer/characterization/characterization_sort/udp/tcp under TCG; full SCTP -Werror build clean.

Phase 2 UDP multi-peer hub implemented and verified: single UDPThread multiplexes N peers over one socket (per-peer egress buffer/seq_no/flush timerfd, IP+port source demux, origin-exclusion fan-out incl peer<->peer reflection). 84a.2.1 resolved via per-peer timerfd in select(). --peer/--peers-file CLI; single-peer byte-identical. All acceptance behaviors pass: native 4-proc loopback hub + nix VM checks multipeer/characterization/characterization_sort/udp/tcp under TCG; full SCTP -Werror build clean.
epoll multi-client accept/track + per-peer decode/route/egress; verified natively 19/19
non-blocking per-peer TX (EPOLLOUT) + SOFT(256K drop-oldest)/HARD(1M disconnect) backlog caps; native isolation 4/4 + nix tcp_multipeer isolation pass

TCP multi-peer server hub: epoll accept/track N clients, per-peer decode/route/egress, non-blocking TX backpressure. Verified native (19/19 + isolation 4/4), TSAN clean, nix tcp_multipeer PASS (TCG), single-peer tcp regression PASS

Tests, docs, hardening delivered and verified: configurable --buffer-frames/--buffer-max pool sizing (5 sites + nix module); CAN ingress-overrun mitigation+detection (SO_RCVBUF + SO_RXQ_OVFL); byte-level multipeer comparison + new ingress.nix check (both PASS under QEMU TCG); README Tuning section (latency/jitter, low-latency config, buffer memory, ingress-overrun caveat). Perf pass under PR #84 CPU pinning deferred to cannelloni-84a.9 (gated on cannelloni-lwo, not merged); baseline captured there.
Trust model stated explicitly in README (new Trust model section + dangling-reference links fixed). Decision: internal/trusted networks only, no peer auth by design.

mDNS/Avahi zeroconf discovery implemented (MdnsDiscovery PIMPL, AVAHI_SUPPORT gate, net-thread handoff, capability+self filters). Verified: AVAHI-off -Werror native build + --mdns rejected; AVAHI-on nix build; mdns nixosTest passes (realized output + live capability-skip confirmation).

Renamed binary cannelloni->cannellonis: CMake exec target+install, help/version/daemon strings + pidfile default, nix package/overlay/flake attrs, services.cannellonis module + cannellonis.service unit + ExecStart, all nixosTest unit refs, README (command invocations + prose + lineage note), mDNS advertised instance name, .gitignore. Preserved (lineage/protocol/legal): GPL headers, C++ namespace cannelloni, CANNELLONI_* wire macros + CannelloniDataPacket, cannelloni-common library, _cannelloni._udp mDNS service TYPE (interop), doc/*.md protocol-spec titles, upstream refs. Build clean (-Werror); binary + banner verified.
